key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh Claude usage data in seconds

key.name: redmine-refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh Redmine data in seconds

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How to display usage in the panel: 'text' for percentage text, 'bar' for a progress bar, or 'both' for both

key.name: icon-style
key.description: Icon style: 'color' for the original colored icon, 'monochrome' for a desaturated monochrome icon

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the icon in the top bar

key.name: panel-box
key.description: Which side of the top panel the indicator appears in: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Index of the indicator within the chosen panel box. Lower values appear closer to the start (left) of that side.

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: HTTP proxy URL (e.g., http://localhost:11809). Leave empty to use no proxy.

key.name: redmine-url
key.description: Base URL of the Redmine server (e.g., https://redmine.example.com). Leave empty to disable.

key.name: redmine-api-key
key.description: API access key used to authenticate with the Redmine server.

key.name: redmine-projects
key.description: IDs of the Redmine projects to fetch data from.

key.name: redmine-project-names
key.description: Map of Redmine project ID to display name, used to label projects in the panel menu.

key.name: redmine-statuses
key.description: IDs of the Redmine issue statuses that count for the Today and Tomorrow sections.

key.name: redmine-hourly-rate
key.description: Hourly pay rate used to estimate earnings (logged time × rate), shown in a tooltip when hovering the monthly time. Set to 0 to disable the earnings tooltip.

key.name: redmine-currency
key.description: Currency label appended to estimated earnings (e.g. USD, EUR, $).

key.name: redmine-currency-decimals
key.description: Number of decimal places to round estimated earnings to. May be negative to round to higher place values (e.g. -2 rounds to the nearest 100).

key.name: redmine-tasks-all-projects
key.description: When enabled, the Today and Tomorrow task sections show issues from every project assigned to you, ignoring the selected projects. The monthly time totals still follow the selected projects.

key.name: hubstaff-refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh Hubstaff data in seconds

key.name: hubstaff-personal-access-token
key.description: Hubstaff personal access token (a long-lived refresh token created at developer.hubstaff.com) used to authenticate with the Hubstaff API. Leave empty to disable. This is the user-entered seed; the rotating token is stored separately in hubstaff-refresh-token.

key.name: hubstaff-refresh-token
key.description: The current Hubstaff refresh token. Hubstaff rotates the refresh token on every access-token exchange, so this is written back by the extension and supersedes hubstaff-personal-access-token once set. Cleared when a new personal access token is entered.

key.name: hubstaff-access-token
key.description: Cached short-lived Hubstaff access token, reused until it is close to expiry to avoid exchanging the refresh token on every refresh.

key.name: hubstaff-token-expires-at
key.description: Unix time (seconds) at which the cached Hubstaff access token expires.

key.name: hubstaff-hourly-rate
key.description: Hourly pay rate used to estimate earnings (tracked time × rate), shown in a tooltip when hovering the tracked time. Set to 0 to disable the earnings tooltip.

key.name: hubstaff-currency
key.description: Currency label appended to estimated earnings (e.g. USD, EUR, $).

key.name: hubstaff-currency-decimals
key.description: Number of decimal places to round estimated earnings to. May be negative to round to higher place values (e.g. -2 rounds to the nearest 100).
